summary: Verified 'remove login page' feature. Guest auto-login works end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 pytest passed (including 3 new guest tests). Frontend: root redirects to /dashboard, no login form ever shown, /login and /register catch-all to /dashboard, sidebar has exactly 5 nav items (no Admin, no Logout), F5 preserves session, theme toggle works, dataset seed → detail (6 tabs) works, /admin loads (guest gets 403 on admin APIs as expected — no crash).
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext bootstrap correctly tries /auth/me first, falls back to /auth/guest — clean.
api.js interceptor retries with /auth/guest on 401 for non-/auth URLs — dedup via guestPromise is good.
auth.py seed_admin also seeds guest@aqi.io idempotently — good.

Guest login yields 4 harmless 401s on very first load (bootstrap /auth/me + parallel /datasets, /history calls before guest cookie is set). Not blocking but could be reduced by awaiting bootstrap before firing dashboard API calls.
server.py L37 uses /api prefix consistently; POST /auth/guest correctly requires no auth. seed_admin creates guest with role=user (not admin) — matches expectation.
test_credentials: No credentials needed. Guest is auto-provisioned as guest@aqi.io (role=user).
seed_data_creation: One sample dataset seeded via UI (Sample_India_AQI_180days.csv, 1440 rows) — auto-cleaned in tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login-page removal verified. Playwright confirmed: (1) / → /dashboard (2) /login,/register,/forgot → /dashboard via catch-all * (3) welcome shows 'Welcome' + 'Guest' (4) sidebar has exactly 5 nav items with no Admin & no logout button (5) seed-sample-btn works and auto-navigates to dataset detail page with 6 tabs (Preview/EDA/Correlation/Trends/Cleaning/Features) (6) F5 refresh preserves session via httpOnly cookies (7) theme toggle switches dark↔light and persists to localStorage key 'aeropulse-theme' (8) /admin loads without crashing (backend returns 403 on admin APIs since guest is role=user). Backend: added TestGuest with 3 tests covering guest login, guest can seed dataset, guest forbidden from admin. All existing tests still pass. login_attempts cleared before test run.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification, not bug fix.
